channel.title: isArchive and isHome
channel.description:
Hey There, I have been using frontity from last few days and i have encountered one major problem is that, frontity always throw archive list **in "/" routes** while i had **loaded homepage on "/" in wordpress.**
How may i fetch properly the "/" wordpress page into "/" frontity as page and not archive list ?

item.title: isArchive and isHome
item.dc:creator: xerxes
item.description:
Thans,Well its work for now.
I dont know how i missed this topic.

Read full topic

item.title: isArchive and isHome
item.dc:creator: Johan
item.description:
Hi @xerxes welcome to the Frontity forums.

It’s actually very easy to change the homepage of Frontity to a regular page instead of the posts archive page as explained in the documentation: @frontity/wp-source - API Reference

I hope this helps you further with your project.

Read full topic

item.title: isArchive and isHome
item.dc:creator: xerxes
item.description:
Hey There,
I have been using frontity from last few days and i have encountered one major problem is that,
frontity always throw archive list in “/” routes while i had loaded homepage on “/” in wordpress.

How may i fetch properly the “/” wordpress page into “/” frontity as page and not archive list ?

Read full topic
